description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the crystallang/crystal:latest Docker image and caches the lib directory. Add a global before_script that updates apt-get quietly, installs libxml2-dev, prints the Crystal version, and runs shards. In the default test stage define a minitest job that executes crystal test/spec_test.cr. Also define a spec job that runs crystal spec, both inheriting the before_script.
